## Checklist

- [ ] PR title: `✨ feat(<scope>): <description>` (or `💥 feat(<scope>)!: ...` for breaking)
- [ ] Labels applied: `enhancement` (+ `breaking-change` if applicable)
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
